== Notes for [[Item:Q89362|Q89362]] ==

http://gw2.geneanet.org/index.php3?b=jfantoine&lang=fr;pz=jean+francois+pierre+paul;nz=antoine;ocz=0;p=caeionia+auchenia+bassa;n=de+rome

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2DEBAA78201EFBBE49822EF79916CC702
geni:6000000003645864696

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
